summary: The video captures a snowy roadside scene with multiple vehicles traveling along a two-lane road bordered by trees. A white sedan is seen driving ahead, followed closely by a dark-colored SUV. The road appears wet due to snowfall, creating a slick surface. As the SUV approaches, it suddenly veers sharply to the left, colliding violently with the dark-colored vehicle, causing both cars to overturn dramatically.

events_timeline.event: A dark-colored SUV travels alongside a white sedan on a snowy road.
The SUV makes an abrupt left turn, colliding violently with the dark-colored vehicle.

uncertainties: Exact nature of the collision impact is unclear.
Visibility of the dark-colored vehicle post-collision is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: The SUV's sudden and violent maneuver results in catastrophic collisions, endangering all occupants and potentially causing fatalities.
